who: law firms managing compliance for 5–15 clients
offer: For law firms managing compliance for 5–15 clients, regulatory changes cause missed filings. We automate compliance updates instead of manual tracking and filing processes.
problem: Keeping up with changing regulations and ensuring timely filings for clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Share insights on Indie Hackers about compliance challenges
DM outreach to law firms with a demo video
Engage in community forums discussing compliance tools
try_it: Let users test filing reminders and compliance dashboards on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Establish default reminder schedules for efficiency
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple compliance reports
